0h8kyh: body {     font-family: Arial, sans-serif;     background: #f4f4f4;     display: flex;     justify-content: center;     align-items: center;     height: 100vh;     margin: 0; } .container {     background: white;     padding: 30px;     border-radius: 10px;     box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);     text-align: center;     width: 400px; } input {     width: 90%;     padding: 10px;     margin: 10px 0; } button {     padding: 10px 20px;     border: none;     background: #007bff;     color: white;     cursor: pointer;     border-radius: 5px; } button:hover {     background: #0056b3; } #result {     margin-top: 15px;     word-wrap: break-word; }
